tweet.text: Good morning world I love seeing all of my fellow parents sharing photos or videos of their kids 1st day of school. It brings back all of my childhood memories. I love that we kept this tradition alive.

GM world! Remember, your worth and value come from within. It's easy to get caught up in seeking validation from others, but true confidence comes from knowing and embracing the incredible person you are. Don't let anyone else define your worth, own your power. #Tuesdaythoughts
Grateful for the opportunity to be on the roster for my 13th season. God is HIM!! 🙏🏾 https://t.co/kOHhXYA1CX

RT @AkronJackson: My story from earlier this summer on Rodney McLeod’s last NFL lap
https://t.co/FydtNQ75jk

RT @HoosFootball: We’re 4 days from #UVA football!
Pictured: Barry Word (1982-1985) was a 3x letter-winner at running back who finished hi…
Recognize your purpose in life!! Grateful to serve a great group of students at Maple Heights who are truly Champions in the classroom!! https://t.co/CFNRSPTMfO

Check out the latest #DawgOnly podcasts where we discuss the evolution of Fatherhood with some of the most seasoned dads on the team. One of my favorite episodes to date. S/O to all my dads out there in the world holding it down. https://t.co/WNUUqwPhbo
RT @BaldyNFL: .@Browns @Flash_Garrett with the Superman Block; @Rodney_McLeod4 with the return for TD. Both players were a menace to the Bi…
RT @Jeff88028836: @Rodney_McLeod4 sorry but your 2020 touchdown In philly is still my favorite!!!! https://t.co/jzAVo9V3oR
